allow: Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "const{Client}=require\('pg'\);const c=new Client\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL,ssl:{rejectUnauthorized:false}}\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"select column_name,is_nullable,column_default from information_schema.columns where table_name='booking_payments' and column_name in \('remaining_balance','amount_paid','room_rate','total_amount','down_payment'\)\\"\)\).then\(r=>{r.rows.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' ',x.column_name.padEnd\(18\),'nullable='+x.is_nullable,'default='+\(x.column_default||'\(none\)'\)\)\);return c.end\(\)}\)")

Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "const{Client}=require\('pg'\);const c=new Client\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL,ssl:{rejectUnauthorized:false}}\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"ALTER TABLE booking_payments ALTER COLUMN remaining_balance SET DEFAULT 0\\"\)\).then\(\(\)=>{console.log\('remaining_balance default set to 0'\);return c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "const{Client}=require\('pg'\);const c=new Client\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL,ssl:{rejectUnauthorized:false}}\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT conname, pg_get_constraintdef\(oid\) def FROM pg_constraint WHERE conrelid='booking_payments'::regclass AND contype='c'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{r.rows.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.conname+': '+x.def\)\);return c.end\(\)}\)")
